glosses.ja: 予約する; 取り置きする

sentences.target: Je réserve une table pour ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʁe.zɛʁv yn tabl puʁ sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Je réserve une table pour ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʁe.zɛʁv yn tabl puʁ sə swaʁ/
translations.en: I’m booking a table for tonight.
translations.es: Estoy reservando una mesa para esta noche.
translations.de: Ich reserviere einen Tisch für heute Abend.
translations.it: Sto prenotando un tavolo per stasera.
translations.yue: 我而家喺度訂今晚嘅枱位。
translations.ru: Я бронирую столик на сегодняшний вечер.
translations.pt: Estou reservando uma mesa para hoje à noite.
translations.tr: Bu akşam için bir masa ayırtıyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đặt bàn cho tối nay.
translations.nl: Ik reserveer een tafel voor vanavond.
translations.uk: Я броню столик на сьогодні ввечері.
translations.hi: मैं आज रात के लिए मेज़ बुक कर रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg reserverer bord til i kveld.
translations.id: Saya memesan meja untuk malam ini.
translations.sv: Jag bokar ett bord till ikväll.
translations.da: Jeg reserverer et bord til i aften.
translations.ja: 今夜の席を予約しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; marks the agent of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; transitive, takes direct object 'une table'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'table'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'réserve'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement ('ce soir').
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'soir'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'pour', indicating time.

sentences.target: Tu réserves les billets pour demain.

translations.fr: Tu réserves les billets pour demain.
translations.en: Are you booking the tickets for tomorrow?
translations.de: Reservierst du die Tickets für morgen?
translations.it: Stai prenotando i biglietti per domani?
translations.yue: 你而家喺度訂聽日嘅票呀？
translations.pt: Você está reservando os ingressos para amanhã?
translations.tr: Yarın için biletleri sen mi ayırtıyorsun?
translations.vi: Bạn đang đặt vé cho ngày mai không?
translations.nl: Ben jij de kaartjes voor morgen aan het reserveren?
translations.hi: क्या तुम कल के लिए टिकट बुक कर रहे हो?
translations.nb: Bestiller du billettene til i morgen?
translations.id: Apakah kamu sedang memesan tiket untuk besok?
translations.da: Bestiller du billetterne til i morgen?
translations.ja: 明日のチケットを予約していますか？

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; agent of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; transitive, takes direct object 'les billets'.
Definite article, plural; determiner of 'billets'.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of 'réserves'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement ('demain').
Temporal adverb specifying when the action is planned; complement of the prepositional phrase 'pour demain'.

sentences.target: On va réserver des places au cinéma.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ va ʁe.zɛʁ.ve de plas o si.ne.ma/

translations.fr: On va réserver des places au cinéma.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ va ʁe.zɛʁ.ve de plas o si.ne.ma/
translations.en: We’re going to book seats at the movies.
translations.es: Vamos a reservar asientos en el cine.
translations.de: Wir werden Plätze im Kino reservieren.
translations.it: Stiamo per prenotare i posti al cinema.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们打算在电影院订座位。
translations.ru: Мы собираемся забронировать места в кино.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi sẽ đặt chỗ ở rạp chiếu phim.
translations.nl: We gaan plaatsen in de bioscoop reserveren.
translations.uk: Ми збираємося забронювати місця в кіно.
translations.hi: हम सिनेमाघर में सीटें बुक करने वाले हैं.
translations.nb: Vi skal reservere seter på kino.
translations.id: Kami akan memesan kursi di bioskop.
translations.sv: Vi ska boka platser på bio.
translations.ro: O să rezervăm locuri la cinema.
translations.cs: Chystáme se rezervovat místa v kině.
translations.da: Vi skal reservere pladser i biografen.
translations.ja: 映画館で席を予約するつもりです。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun often used colloquially for 'we'; subject of 'va'.
Auxiliary-like verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; part of near-future construction 'aller + infinitif'.
Infinitive main verb complement of 'va'; denotes intended action.
Indefinite article, plural; determiner of 'places'.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of 'réserver'.
Preposition (contraction of 'à le'); introduces locative complement 'au cinéma'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au', indicating location.

sentences.target: Nous réservons une chambre pour samedi.

translations.fr: Nous réservons une chambre pour samedi.
translations.en: We’re booking a room for Saturday.
translations.es: Estamos reservando una habitación para el sábado.
translations.de: Wir reservieren ein Zimmer für Samstag.
translations.it: Stiamo prenotando una camera per sabato.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在预订周六的房间。
translations.yue: 我哋而家喺度訂星期六嘅房。
translations.pt: Estamos reservando um quarto para sábado.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đặt phòng cho thứ bảy.
translations.nl: We reserveren een kamer voor zaterdag.
translations.hi: हम शनिवार के लिए कमरा बुक कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Κλείνουμε ένα δωμάτιο για το Σάββατο.
translations.nb: Vi reserverer et rom til lørdag.
translations.id: Kami sedang memesan kamar untuk hari Sabtu.
translations.sv: Vi bokar ett rum till på lördag.
translations.da: Vi reserverer et værelse til lørdag.
translations.ja: 土曜日に泊まる部屋を予約しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural; agent of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person plural; transitive, takes direct object 'une chambre'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'chambre'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'réservons'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement ('samedi').
Common noun denoting a day of the week; object of the preposition 'pour', indicating time.
